title: No podman container ps command exists

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Huh? Did you mean to remove `ls` instead?
```
$ ./bin/podman container ps
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE  COMMAND  CREATED  STATUS  PORTS  NAMES

$ ./bin/podman container ls
[usage message]
```
What @edsantiago said, although my bits on my vm might be behind.   The change itself looks fine if the command doesn't exist.

`podman container ps` may work, but it is not supported.  There is no equivalent to `docker container ps`
so we should remove it until we can fix our CLI.
Main reason I want to get rid of it, is lack of support and it is reported by the test podman-commands.sh

I'm less confused now: at the time I commented, I wasn't aware of @baude's #2480.

Can we hold off on this PR until #2480 is merged? In particular, if 2480 is merged as it is right now, then you should amend this PR to **also remove `ls`**. The new post-2480 command for listing containers is simply `list`, with no `ls` or `ps` aliases.

Well no because ls is valid.  We are trying to find a way to show list and ls for podman container and not ps.
Lets just merge this and if we have to fix a different man page we can do it in a different PR>
What I'm trying to say, is, `ls` is not valid. That is: `./bin/podman container ls` does not exist, at least not on current master 4a109a71996e99c9a95b639bbbee1c5e30450c97
Well it should exists and that is the bug.
ill hit it with a lgtm assuming the rest will pass?
